# Contribution Guidelines

This repository is part of the ICT946 Capstone Project.

## Git Workflow

All team members should follow the Git workflow when contributing to the project.

1. Pull the latest changes
git pull

2. Add new files
git add .

3. Commit changes
git commit -m "Describe the change"

4. Push to GitHub
git push

## Team Collaboration

Each team member should regularly update the repository and ensure documentation is maintained.
